spots.name: Hội An Ancient Town
spots.shortDescription: A lantern-lit riverside trading town with preserved timber houses, temples and Japanese-influenced bridges.
spots.whyVisit: Atmospheric evenings, cycling lanes, cooking classes and heritage architecture.
spots.openingHours: Old town is accessible daily; ticketed heritage sites have daytime hours
spots.entranceFee: Old Town sightseeing ticket required for many heritage sites
spots.topActivities: Lantern walk, cycling, cooking class, market visit
spots.nearbyAttractions: An Bàng Beach, My Son Sanctuary
spots.travelTips: Explore early morning or after sunset, and carry small cash for food stalls.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 灯笼点缀的河畔贸易古镇，保留木造民居、庙宇与日式建筑影响。

spots.name: Tràng An Scenic Landscape Complex
spots.shortDescription: A UNESCO-listed landscape of limestone karsts, waterways, caves and ancient temples.
spots.whyVisit: Rowboat journeys through cave tunnels and dramatic ‘land Ha Long Bay’ scenery.
spots.entranceFee: Boat-route ticket required; check current local price
spots.topActivities: Sampan boat ride, cave passage, temple stops
spots.nearbyAttractions: Tam Cốc, Hoa Lư Ancient Capital
spots.travelTips: Go early to avoid crowds and bring sun protection for the open boat.
spots.mapQuery: Trang An Scenic Landscape Complex, Ninh Binh, Vietnam
spots.chineseShortDescription: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产地，拥有石灰岩峰林、水道、洞穴与古老寺庙。

spots.name: Phong Nha–Kẻ Bàng National Park
spots.shortDescription: A dramatic karst national park celebrated for huge cave systems, rivers and jungle landscapes.
spots.whyVisit: Cave excursions, river trips and some of Asia’s most spectacular underground scenery.
spots.openingHours: Tours operate in daylight; weather affects access
spots.topActivities: Phong Nha Cave boat tour, Paradise Cave, jungle trekking
spots.travelTips: Book specialist caves well ahead and avoid the wettest months for more reliable access.
spots.mapQuery: Phong Nha Ke Bang National Park, Vietnam
spots.chineseShortDescription: 以巨型洞穴系统、河流和丛林喀斯特地貌闻名的壮丽国家公园。

spots.name: Ho Chi Minh City
spots.shortDescription: Vietnam’s energetic southern metropolis, mixing colonial landmarks, markets, museums and modern cafés.
spots.whyVisit: Food, history, local markets and a fast-moving urban atmosphere.
spots.entranceFee: Most public areas free; museums are ticketed
spots.topActivities: Ben Thanh Market, War Remnants Museum, street-food tour
spots.travelTips: Use ride-hailing for longer trips and plan indoor museum visits during the hottest part of the day.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 越南南部充满活力的大都会，融合殖民地建筑、市场、博物馆与现代咖啡文化。

spots.name: Ha Long Bay
spots.shortDescription: A UNESCO World Heritage seascape of limestone islands rising from emerald water.
spots.whyVisit: Cruises, kayaking, caves and wide coastal views.
spots.nearbyAttractions: Ti Top Island, Sung Sot Cave
spots.travelTips: Book a cruise ahead, bring sunscreen and check weather conditions.
spots.mapQuery: Ha Long Bay, Quang Ninh, Vietnam
spots.chineseShortDescription: 由石灰岩岛屿从翡翠色海水中拔起的联合国教科文组织世界遗产海景。

spots.name: Hà Nội
spots.shortDescription: A standout historic capital destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: Old Quarter lanes, lakes, museums and a celebrated food culture.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.topActivities: Old Quarter walk, street-food tour, water puppets
spots.nearbyAttractions: Hoàn Kiếm Lake, Temple of Literature
spots.travelTips: Cross roads carefully and explore early for a quieter Old Quarter.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 越南历史首都，拥有老城区巷弄、湖泊、博物馆和丰富的美食文化。

spots.name: Sa Pa Rice Terraces
spots.shortDescription: A standout mountain landscape destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: Rice terraces, mountain trails and highland village culture.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.topActivities: Trekking, Fansipan cable car, village visits
spots.travelTips: Bring layers: mountain weather changes quickly.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 高山梯田与少数民族村落交织的凉爽山城景观。

spots.name: Huế Imperial City
spots.shortDescription: A standout imperial heritage destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: Nguyễn-dynasty palaces, tombs and refined central-Vietnam cuisine.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.topActivities: Imperial Citadel, Perfume River cruise, royal tombs
spots.nearbyAttractions: Thiên Mụ Pagoda, Khải Định Tomb
spots.travelTips: Use a bicycle or driver to link the dispersed tombs.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 阮朝皇宫、陵墓与香江两岸景观共同构成的越南皇城文化中心。

spots.name: Đà Nẵng
spots.shortDescription: A standout coastal city destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: Long beaches, modern city energy and easy access to central Vietnam.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.topActivities: My Khe Beach, Sơn Trà Peninsula, Marble Mountains
spots.travelTips: Plan beaches early and leave room for a day trip to Hội An.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 拥有绵长海滩、现代城市氛围，并可轻松前往越南中部名胜的海滨城市。

spots.name: Nha Trang Bay
spots.shortDescription: A standout beach resort destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: A broad city beach backed by islands, seafood and water sports.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.nearbyAttractions: Po Nagar Cham Towers, Hon Mun
spots.travelTips: Book licensed boat trips and use reef-safe sunscreen.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 由城市海滩、岛屿、海鲜与水上活动组成的热带海湾度假地。

spots.name: Đà Lạt
spots.shortDescription: A standout highland retreat destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: Cool pine-covered hills, flower farms and café culture.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.travelTips: Pack a light jacket for cool evenings.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 松林覆盖的凉爽高原城市，以花卉农场、湖泊和咖啡馆文化闻名。

spots.name: Phú Quốc Island
spots.shortDescription: A standout island escape destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: Tropical beaches, clear water and a relaxed island pace.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.nearbyAttractions: Sao Beach, Phú Quốc National Park
spots.travelTips: Book ferries and flights early in peak season.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 拥有热带海滩、清澈海水和悠闲岛屿节奏的越南南部岛屿。

spots.name: Mũi Né Sand Dunes
spots.shortDescription: A standout coastal landscape destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: A beach town famed for red and white dunes and wind sports.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.travelTips: Visit dunes around sunrise or sunset and protect electronics from sand.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 以红白沙丘、海滩与风帆运动闻名的海岸小镇。

spots.name: Hà Giang Loop
spots.shortDescription: A standout mountain road trip destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: A spectacular mountain route through limestone passes and ethnic minority villages.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.nearbyAttractions: Mã Pí Lèng Pass, Nho Quế River
spots.travelTips: Use an experienced local driver if you are not confident on mountain roads.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 穿越石灰岩山口与少数民族村落的壮观北部山地路线。

spots.name: Côn Đảo Islands
spots.shortDescription: A standout island nature destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
spots.whyVisit: Quiet beaches, marine life and a powerful historic landscape.
spots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
spots.nearbyAttractions: Côn Đảo National Park, Côn Sơn town
spots.travelTips: Accommodation is limited; reserve early in high season.
spots.chineseShortDescription: 宁静海滩、海洋生物与深刻历史记忆并存的群岛。
